defs: (third-person singular) (since the early 20th century, usu. male) he; him; his
(bound form) other; another; some other (as in 他日[ta1 ri4] and 他人[ta1 ren2])
another person; sb else; other people
Thaksin Shinawatra (1949-), Thai businessman and politician, prime minister 2001-2006
(euphemistic variant of 他媽的|他妈的[ta1 ma1 de5])
same as 他媽的|他妈的[ta1 ma1 de5]

pinyin: ta1 shan1 zhi1 shi2 ke3 yi3 gong1 yu4
defs: lit. the other mountain's stone can polish jade (idiom); to improve oneself by accepting criticism from outside
to borrow talent from abroad to develop the nation effectively
external regulation (e.g. by means of a regulatory body, as opposed to self-regulation 自律[zi4 lu:4])
meeting an old friend in a foreign place (idiom)
